title: Double Digestion of Insert DNA
author: Igem Dusseldorf
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.79ehr3e

steps.title: Combined enzyme volume should not exceed...
steps.instruction: Combined enzyme volume should not exceed 1/10 of the total reaction volume. For double digestion with two FastDigest restriction enzymes, mix: %s %s PCR Purified 2016.07.25ng/uLGene DNA Tube X50ComponentVolume x2µl]Sterile MilliQ Water2410x FastDigest Buffer4PCR-amplified DNA8FastDigest Enzyme 12FastDigest Enzyme 22Total Volume40Total ng of DNA400 Total Volume can vary. Other components need to be adjusted.

steps.title: Incubate at enzyme suitable conditions Find...
steps.instruction: Incubate at enzyme suitable conditions Find out suitable conditions on website of particular science company

steps.title: Inactivate the enzyme at suitable conditions...
steps.instruction: Inactivate the enzyme at suitable conditions Find out suitable conditions on website of particular science company

steps.title: Optional
steps.instruction: Optional: Load on 1% agarose gel and run (duration and voltage vary)
